messages.content:
this is a cold email written to dentist who owns their own practise
rewrite this in a clever way
I am Amy from NexGen Media. Firstly let me state that as owner of your practise you must be getting a lot of emails and deleting most of them just as I do.

We have created a framework for dentists that will get you patients on auto pilot mode , when all is said and done by us, you just need to look at your calendar and show up for the appointment with your patient.

We can Help you Get at least 20 new patients every month guaranteed or else we’ll work for free until we get you there!

So that being said [[data:firstname:""]] would you be interested in learning more?

Subject: Ignite Your Dental Practice with Our Unstoppable Patient-Generating Framework!

Dear Dr. [First Name],

I hope this email finds you well amidst your busy schedule as a thriving dental practice owner. As a fellow business owner, I know how overwhelming it can be to sift through countless emails that flood our inboxes, only to delete most of them without a second thought.

Allow me to catch your attention with an incredible opportunity that will revolutionize the way you attract patients: NexGen Media's groundbreaking dental patient-acquisition framework. With this game-changing system, we bring patients directly to your doorstep, on autopilot. No more painstaking efforts or marketing headaches – just a fully-booked calendar waiting for you to greet your eager patients.

Picture this: a guaranteed minimum of 20 new patients every month, effortlessly flowing into your practice. And if we don't deliver on this promise, we'll work for free until we achieve the desired results for your practice. That's our unwavering commitment to your success.

So, Dr. [Last Name], are you ready to take your dental practice to soaring heights? Put us to the test, and let us show you the immense potential that awaits your practice. I would love to share more details and explore how NexGen Media can bolster your patient acquisition process.

I eagerly await your response, Dr. [Last Name]. Together, let's unlock the untapped potential that lies within your practice.

Warm regards,

Amy 
NexGen Media

We have created a framework for dentists that will get you patients on auto pilot mode , when all is said and done by us, you just need to look at your calendar and show up for the appointment with your patient.

We can Help you Get at least 20 new patients every month guaranteed or else we’ll work for free until we get you there!

So that being said [[data:firstname:""]] would you be interested in learning more?

Subject: Spice Up Your Dental Practice: Get Patients Flowing In with Our Magical Framework!

Dear Dr. [First Name],

Stop right there, dental maestro! I know exactly what you're thinking – another boring email that'll make its way to the trash bin faster than a tooth extraction. But hang on, because this email is about to take your dental practice on a wild, laughter-filled ride!

Here's the deal: we, the masterminds at NexGen Media, have conjured up a mind-blowing framework that will have patients flocking to your practice on autopilot. Yes, you heard that right – sit back, relax, and watch as the appointments fill up without you lifting a single dental instrument.

And here's our promise: a guaranteed 20 new patients every single month. And if we don't deliver on this audacious claim, we'll work for free until we get you there. That's right, we're putting our money where our mouth is, literally.

So, Dr. [Last Name], are you ready to kick mediocrity to the curb and unleash the power of our dental sorcery? We're itching to spill the beans and show you how NexGen Media can turn your practice into a patient-magnet extravaganza.

Reply back to this email, and let's embark on an adventure that will make your dental colleagues envy your overflowing appointment calendar. We can't wait to sprinkle some magic into your practice!

Stay smiling,

Amy 
Chief Fun Officer 
NexGen Media

write a variation of this email

 Hey Dr.{{first-name}},

 
I am Amy from NexGen Media. Firstly let me state that as the owner of your practice, you must be getting a lot of emails and deleting most of them just as I do.



We have created a framework for dentists that will get your patients on autopilot mode, when all is said and done by us, you just need to look at your calendar and show up for the appointment with your patient.

 

 Here’s our promise: a guaranteed 15 new patients every single month. And if we don’t deliver on this audacious claim, we’ll work for free until we get you there. That’s right, we’re putting our money where our mouth is, literally. So that being said {{first-name}},

would you be interested in learning more?

Looking forward
Amy

Hey Dr. [First Name],

Hope this email finds you with your dental tools gleaming and your patients smiling! I know how overwhelming it can be to wade through a sea of emails, doing the delete dance like a pro. But guess what? This email isn't just another mundane message. It's about unleashing the power of NexGen Media and transforming your dental practice into an unstoppable force.

Picture this: a framework so mesmerizing, so magical, that it'll put your patient acquisition efforts on autopilot. All you have to do is check your calendar and show up for those booming appointments. That's right, we're talking about more patients than you can count without breaking a sweat.

Hold onto your dental chair, because here's our jaw-dropping promise: a minimum of 15 brand spanking new patients every single month, guaranteed. And if we don't deliver on this astonishing claim, we'll work for free until we get you there. That's how much we believe in the power of our dental sorcery.

So, Dr. [Last Name], are you ready to embrace this extraordinary opportunity? Say yes and prepare to witness the dental practice transformation of a lifetime. Trust us, it'll make tooth fairies jealous!

Excitedly awaiting your response,

Amy 
Your Partner in Dental Greatness 
NexGen Media

rewrite this email in a funny way
Hi [[data:firstname:""]] I’ve tried to reach you a few times to go over your dental practise but haven’t heard back which tells me one of three things:

1) You’re all set with ____ and I should stop bothering you.

2) You’re still interested but haven’t had the time to get back to me yet.
3) You’ve fallen and can’t get up and in that case let me know and I’ll call someone to help you ….

Please let me know which one as I’m starting to worry!
Looking Forward

Hey there, [First Name]!

Okay, so I've been trying to reach you with the determination of a dentist trying to yank out a stubborn tooth. But alas, I haven't heard a peep from you, and it's got me scratching my head like a dentist searching for a hidden cavity.

Now, there could be three possible reasons for your radio silence. Let's break 'em down:

1) You've got everything under control and my persistent emails are about as useful as a toothpick in a dental emergency. In that case, let me know, and I'll retreat faster than a dental floss snapped by an overzealous patient.

2) You're still interested, but life has been busier than a beaver building a dam, and you simply haven't found the time to respond. Hey, I get it! Just give me a heads-up, and we'll navigate your schedule like a dentist maneuvering around a mouthful of braces.

3) And now for the most random (but entertaining) possibility – the mighty force of gravity took you down, and you're stuck, unable to get back up. If that's the case, my friend, kindly let me know, and I'll send a crack team of dental superheroes to your rescue! After all, we're here to save the day (and your teeth).

So, what's the verdict, [First Name]? I'm starting to lose sleep, wondering which scenario has befallen you. Please put my worried mind at ease and shed some light on this dental mystery!

Eagerly awaiting your response,

The Slightly Worried but Committed Amy

wright 10 funny subject lines for this email
Hey Dr {{first-name}},

I know you're tired of depending on referrals to get more patients. 

We've helped dentists like you get more patients through the door, and we can do the same for you.

Our game-changing offer: We guarantee 15 new patients every single month. That's right, we're so confident in our ability to get you results that we're willing to put our money where our mouth is.

And if we don't deliver on this promise, we'll work for free until we get there. No excuses, no gimmicks.s.

P.S.

I know you're busy, so I'll make this easy for you. Just reply to this email with the words "I'm in" and I'll schedule a time to chat with you. I'll answer any questions you have and show you how we can help you grow your practice.

Regards,
Amy
